ch1Origin.en:
### The Woman Who Runs Hot and Heavy

You probably noticed it early — your skin broke out more than your friends', your face got shiny by midday, and you always felt a little... inflamed. Maybe doctors said it was hormones, or stress, or «just your skin type.» But underneath, there's a specific TCM pattern: Damp-Heat.

**Damp-Heat in women often starts with a Spleen that can't drain fluids properly.** The Spleen is your digestive engine. When it's overworked — by heavy meals, sweets, irregular eating, or chronic worry — fluids accumulate as «dampness.» But unlike pure Phlegm-Dampness, your body also carries excess heat. This heat might come from a naturally vigorous constitution, from emotional frustration that «stews» internally, from spicy and rich foods, or from living in a hot, humid climate.

**The menstrual cycle reveals the pattern.** Many Damp-Heat women experience premenstrual acne flares, shorter cycles with heavy flow, vaginal discharge that's yellowish or thick, and intense irritability before their period. The heat pushes upward (acne, red face, irritability) while the dampness settles downward (discharge, heaviness, bloating). These aren't separate problems — they're the same pattern expressing itself in different directions.

**The environmental trigger.** If you grew up in a humid climate (Southeast Asia, southern China, the American South, tropical regions), external damp-heat reinforced your internal pattern. Summer months probably feel unbearable — your acne worsens, your body feels heavier, your mood frays. This isn't coincidence; it's external damp-heat feeding internal damp-heat.

**The diet that created it.** Years of spicy food, fried food, alcohol, cheese, late-night eating, and sugary drinks gradually built this pattern. Each spicy meal added heat. Each rich, heavy meal added dampness. Together, they created a «steaming» environment inside your body — like a kitchen with the stove on high and the exhaust fan broken.

**The good news: Damp-Heat is one of the most responsive patterns to diet and lifestyle changes.** Because it's largely accumulated from daily habits, correcting those habits can produce dramatic improvements within weeks. The right soups, the right teas, and the right daily routine can transform your skin, your mood, and your menstrual comfort faster than almost any other constitution type.
ch1Origin.zh-TW:
### 燥熱而沉重的女性

你或許很早就發現了——你的皮膚比朋友們更容易冒痘，到了中午臉上就泛油光，總覺得身體有點……發炎。也許醫生說這是荷爾蒙問題、壓力太大，或「就是這種膚質」。但在更深層，這是一個明確的中醫體質：濕熱質。

**女性的濕熱質，往往始於脾臟無法正常代謝水液。** 脾是人體的消化引擎。當它過度操勞——暴飲暴食、嗜甜、飲食不規律，或長期思慮過度——水液便會積聚成「濕」。但與單純的痰濕質不同，你的體內還蘊藏著多餘的熱。這股熱可能來自天生體質偏熱、情緒鬱結在體內「悶燒」、長期吃辛辣肥甘的食物，或居住在炎熱潮濕的環境中。

**月經週期最能揭示這個體質。** 許多濕熱質女性經前痘痘爆發、週期偏短且經量偏多、白帶偏黃或黏稠，經前情緒特別煩躁。熱往上走（痘痘、面色潮紅、煩躁），濕往下沉（帶下異常、身體沉重、腹脹）。這些不是不同的問題——而是同一個體質在不同方向的表現。

**環境的觸發因素。** 如果你在潮濕的環境中長大（東南亞、華南、美國南方、熱帶地區），外來的濕熱會強化你體內的濕熱體質。夏季對你來說可能最難熬——痘痘惡化、身體更沉重、情緒更容易煩躁。這不是巧合，而是外濕熱在滋養內濕熱。

**飲食是重要成因。** 多年來的辛辣食物、油炸食品、酒精、乳酪、宵夜和含糖飲料，逐漸塑造了這個體質。每一頓辣的加了熱，每一頓肥甘厚味添了濕。兩者結合，在體內營造出一個「蒸騰」的環境——就像廚房裡大火猛燒，抽油煙機卻壞了。

**好消息是：濕熱質是對飲食和生活方式調整反應最靈敏的體質之一。** 因為它很大程度上是由日常習慣日積月累而成的，矯正這些習慣可以在數週內帶來顯著改善。正確的湯品、茶飲和日常作息，能比幾乎任何其他體質更快地改善你的皮膚、情緒和經期不適。

ch1Emotion.en:
### The Fire Under the Surface

Damp-Heat creates one of the most volatile emotional patterns in TCM — because you're simultaneously heavy (dampness) and irritable (heat).

**Quick-tempered but exhausted.** The heat makes you reactive. Small things trigger disproportionate frustration. You snap, then feel guilty, then snap again. But underneath the fire, there's exhaustion — the dampness drains your energy while the heat revs your nervous system. You feel simultaneously overstimulated and depleted, like a car engine overheating while running out of gas.

**The frustration-body loop.** In TCM, the Liver ensures smooth flow of Qi and emotions. When damp-heat obstructs the Liver, emotional flow gets «stuck» — frustration builds, can't express itself cleanly, and turns inward as more heat. This is why you feel better after a good cry, a vigorous workout, or a honest conversation — anything that moves stagnant emotional energy.

**Perfectionism and control.** Many Damp-Heat women develop perfectionist tendencies because internal discomfort creates a need for external order. Your space is probably organized, your standards are high, and disorder genuinely bothers you. This isn't a personality flaw — it's your nervous system compensating for internal chaos by creating external control.

**Social mask vs. private struggle.** You may present a confident, energetic face to the world while privately battling acne, body odor anxiety, digestive discomfort, and the feeling that your body is «too much» — too oily, too sweaty, too inflamed. The disconnect between your public image and private self-care burden creates chronic low-grade shame that feeds the heat pattern further.

**When the heat clears, the real you emerges.** Not the reactive, irritable version — the warm, passionate, genuinely enthusiastic version that's been buried under inflammation. Most Damp-Heat women are naturally charismatic and driven. Clear the pattern, and these qualities shine without the inflammation overlay.
ch1Emotion.zh-TW:
### 表面之下的火

濕熱質在中醫裡會形成最波動的情緒模式之一——因為你同時被「濕」拖累（沉重）和「熱」驅動（煩躁）。

**急躁卻又疲憊。** 熱讓你容易衝動反應。一點小事就能引爆不成比例的煩躁。你發了脾氣，隨後又感到內疚，然後又忍不住再發脾氣。但在這把火之下，是深層的疲憊——濕在消耗你的精力，而熱在加速你的神經系統。你同時感到過度刺激和虛脫，就像一輛引擎過熱卻快沒油的汽車。

**鬱悶與身體的循環。** 在中醫理論中，肝主疏泄，負責氣機與情緒的順暢流通。當濕熱阻滯肝氣，情緒的流動就會「卡住」——鬱悶不斷積累，無法順暢表達，轉而向內化為更多的熱。這就是為什麼大哭一場、大汗淋漓地運動、或坦誠地跟人聊聊之後，你會覺得好很多——任何能推動停滯情緒的方式都有幫助。

**完美主義與控制欲。** 許多濕熱質女性發展出完美主義傾向，因為內在的不適讓人需要外在的秩序。你的空間可能井然有序，標準很高，混亂確實會讓你不舒服。這不是性格缺陷——而是你的神經系統在用外在的控制來補償內在的混亂。

**社交面具與私下掙扎。** 你可能在人前展現自信、精力充沛的一面，私下卻在與痘痘、體味焦慮、腸胃不適，以及覺得自己身體「太多了」——太油、太會出汗、太容易發炎——的感覺搏鬥。公眾形象與私下自我照護負擔之間的落差，會產生慢性的低度羞恥感，進一步滋養熱的體質。

**當熱退了，真正的你就會浮現。** 不是那個急躁易怒的版本，而是被發炎埋沒的那個溫暖、熱情、真誠且有活力的你。大多數濕熱質女性天生具有魅力和衝勁。清除了這個體質，這些特質就會在沒有發炎的遮蔽下綻放光芒。

Gentian is the strongest herb for draining Liver damp-heat; tangerine peel regulates Qi and prevents the gentian from being too harsh. This is a targeted therapeutic tea — not for daily use but for flare-ups of acne, irritability, or bitter taste in the mouth. Drink 3-5 days during flare-ups, then switch to milder teas.
winter.zh-TW: 龍膽草陳皮茶——龍膽草 3 克＋陳皮 5 克，煮 10 分鐘。龍膽草是清瀉肝膽濕熱力量最強的傳統食材；陳皮理氣健脾，可防止龍膽草過於苦寒傷胃。這是一款針對性的調理茶——不適合日常飲用，而是用於痘痘爆發、煩躁加重或口苦時。在症狀發作時連續飲用 3-5 天，之後改為較溫和的茶飲。
winter.ja: Gentian & T怒りine Peel Tea — 3g gentian root (long dan cao) + 5g aged t怒りine peel, simmered 10 分s. Gentian is the strongest herb for clearing Liver damp-heat; t怒りine peel regulates 気と予防s gentianからbeingもharsh. Thisはa targeted therapeutic お茶 — notのためにdaily use butのためにflare-upsの痘痘, 短気,かbitter tasteでmouth. Drink 3-5 日sの間にflare-ups,その後switchに軽度のer お茶s.

spring.en: Spring is Liver season — your most vulnerable time. The Liver's energy rises, and if it's already carrying heat, it «overheats» in spring. Expect more irritability, acne flares (especially along the jawline), and PMS. Counter this with chrysanthemum tea, gentle outdoor exercise, and EARLIER bedtimes. Spring cleaning your diet now prevents summer meltdowns.
spring.zh-TW: 春季屬肝——是你最脆弱的季節。肝氣升發，若體內本已蘊熱，春天就容易「過熱」。預期會出現更多煩躁、痘痘爆發（特別在下顎線），以及經前症候群加重。用菊花茶、輕鬆的戶外運動和更早的就寢時間來應對。現在就做好飲食的春季大掃除，可以預防夏季的全面崩盤。
spring.ja: Springは肝味付け— yourmostvulnerable time. The 肝's 精力 rises,とif it's already carrying 熱, it «over熱s»で春. Expect more 短気, 痘痘 flares (especially along jawline),とPMS. Counter thisと共にchrysanthemum お茶, gentle outdoor 運動,とEARLIER 就寝前s. Spring cleaning your 食事今予防s 夏 meltdowns.

summer.en: Summer is your worst enemy and your best opportunity. External heat + humidity amplifies your internal damp-heat, making it the most uncomfortable season. BUT it's also when damp-heat is most responsive to treatment — the body's pores are open, sweating is natural, and cooling foods are everywhere. Maximize mung beans, winter melon, bitter melon, and cooling teas. Minimize air conditioning abuse (it traps heat inside).
summer.zh-TW: 夏天是你最大的敵人，也是最好的機會。外在的暑熱與潮濕會放大你體內的濕熱，讓這成為最難受的季節。但這也是濕熱最容易被調理的時候——毛孔張開、出汗自然、清涼食物隨處可得。多吃綠豆、冬瓜、苦瓜，多喝清熱茶飲。盡量減少過度依賴冷氣（會把熱悶在體內）。
summer.ja: Summerはyour最悪のenemyとyour最高のopportunity. External 熱 + humidity amplifies your 内側の damp-熱, making itmostuncomfortable season. BUT it's alsoるときdamp-熱はmost responsiveにtr食べるment — 体's poresはopen, sw食べるingはnatural,と冷やすing 食物sはeverywhere. Maximize mung beans, 冬 melon, bitter melon,と冷やすing お茶s. Minimize air 状態ing abuse (it traps 熱 inside).

autumn.en: Autumn's cool, dry nature is naturally therapeutic for you. The external heat diminishes, and your body begins to clear accumulated summer heat. Support this transition with gentle heat-clearing teas, normal (not excessive) moisturizing, and a gradual shift from purely cooling foods to balanced nourishment. This is your recovery season — use it well.
autumn.zh-TW: 秋季的涼爽乾燥本質上對你有調理作用。外在的熱消退了，身體開始排出夏季積累的熱。用溫和的清熱茶飲、適度（不過度）的保濕，以及從純清涼食物逐步過渡到均衡滋養的方式，來支持這個轉換期。這是你的恢復季節——好好把握。
autumn.ja: Autumn's 冷やす,乾燥したnatureはnaturally therapeuticのためにyou. The 外側の 熱 diminishes,とyour 体 beginsに清accumulated夏 熱. Support this transitionと共にgentle 熱-清ing お茶s, normal (not excessive) moisturizing,とa gradual shiftからpurely 冷やすing 食物sにバランスd 滋養ment. Thisはyour recovery味付け— use it well.

winter.en: Winter is your easiest season — external cold suppresses internal heat, and you probably feel more comfortable than at any other time. But don't overindulge in heating foods just because you «can.» Excess spicy food, lamb, and alcohol in winter will create a damp-heat debt that explodes in spring. Maintain moderation. Use this season to strengthen your Spleen with warm, nourishing (not spicy) foods.
winter.zh-TW: 冬季是你最輕鬆的季節——外在的寒冷壓制了內在的熱，你可能覺得比任何時候都舒服。但不要因為「可以」就放縱吃熱性食物。冬天過量食用辛辣食物、羊肉和酒精，會積下濕熱的債，到了春天就會爆發。保持節制。利用這個季節用溫暖、滋養（非辛辣）的食物來健脾。
winter.ja: Winterはyour easiest味付け— 外側の冷たいsuppresses 内側の 熱,とyou probably感じるmore comfortable than atいくつかother time. But don't overindulgeで熱ing 食物sただbecause you «can.» Excess spicy 食物, lamb,とalcoholで冬するcr食べるe a damp-熱 debt that explodesで春. Maintain moderation. Use this seasonに強化 your 脾と共に温める, 滋養ing (not spicy) 食物s.

ch4Acupoints.en:
**Taichong (太冲) — Supreme Rush**
Location: On the top of the foot, in the depression between the 1st and 2nd metatarsal bones.
Method: Press firmly for 3 minutes each side, morning and evening.
Effect: THE point for clearing Liver heat and moving stagnant Qi. For women with irritability, premenstrual acne, and the feeling of «bottled-up frustration,» this point directly vents the heat. Press more firmly on the days you feel irritable — you'll feel the tension release in real time.
ch4Acupoints.zh-TW:
**太衝穴——足厥陰肝經原穴**
位置：足背側，第一與第二蹠骨之間的凹陷處。
方法：早晚各按壓 3 分鐘，兩側交替，力度適中偏重。
功效：清肝瀉熱、疏肝理氣的第一要穴。對於容易煩躁、經前冒痘、總覺得「鬱悶悶在心裡」的女性，按壓此穴可直接疏泄肝熱。煩躁的日子可以加重力度——你會即時感受到壓力的釋放。
ch4Acupoints.ja:
**Taichong (太冲) — Supreme Rush**
Location: On topの足,で抑郁症の間に1stと2nd metatarsal 骨s.
Method: Press firmlyのために3 分s各side, 朝と夜.
Effect: THE pointのために清ing 肝 熱とmoving stagnant 気. For womenと共に短気, premenstrual 痘痘,とfeelingの«bottled-up frustration,» thispointdirectly vents 熱. Press more firmly on 日s you感じるirritable — you'll感じる緊張 releaseでreal time.

ch4Acupoints.en:
**Yinlingquan (阴陵泉) — Yin Mound Spring**
Location: Inner leg, just below knee, in depression below inner knee bone.
Method: Press firmly for 3 minutes each side, once daily.
Effect: The primary dampness-draining point. For Damp-Heat women, this point addresses the «damp» half of the pattern — reduces water retention, heavy legs, bloating, and the sluggishness that makes you feel like you're wading through mud. Combine with Taichong for a complete damp-heat clearing pair.
ch4Acupoints.zh-TW:
**陰陵泉穴——足太陰脾經合穴**
位置：小腿內側，膝蓋正下方，脛骨內側髁下方的凹陷處。
方法：每日一次，每側按壓 3 分鐘，力度適中偏重。
功效：利水滲濕的第一要穴。對於濕熱質女性，此穴處理的是體質中「濕」的那一面——減少水腫、改善腿部沉重、消除腹脹，以及那種如陷泥淖般的遲鈍感。搭配太衝穴，即可構成完整的清利濕熱穴位組合。
ch4Acupoints.ja:
**陰lingquan (阴陵泉) — 陰 Mound Spring**
Location: Inner 足,ただbelow knee,で抑郁症 below inner knee 骨.
Method: Press firmlyのために3 分s各side, once daily.
Effect: The 一次 湿気-利ing point. For Damp-H食べる women, thispointaddresses «damp» halfのpattern — 軽減s 水 retention, heavy 足s, bloating,とsluggishness that makes you感じるlike you're wadingを通じてmud. Combineと共にTaichongのためにa完了するdamp-熱 清ing pair.

ch4Acupoints.en:
**Quchi (曲池) — Crooked Pond**
Location: Outer elbow crease, at the end of the fold when the arm is bent.
Method: Press firmly for 2-3 minutes each side, twice daily.
Effect: The key point for clearing heat from the skin. For women with acne, rashes, oily skin, and body odor, Quchi vents heat through the skin's surface. This point is particularly effective for jawline and cheek acne that flares before menstruation. Press consistently for 2 weeks to see skin improvement.
ch4Acupoints.zh-TW:
**曲池穴——手陽明大腸經合穴**
位置：肘橫紋外側端，屈肘時肘彎褶皺盡頭處。
方法：每日兩次，每側按壓 2-3 分鐘，力度適中偏重。
功效：清瀉肌膚之熱的關鍵穴位。對於有痘痘、皮疹、皮膚出油和體味困擾的女性，曲池穴可透過肌膚表面疏泄熱邪。此穴位對經前加劇的下顎和臉頰痘痘尤為有效。持續按壓兩週可見皮膚改善。
ch4Acupoints.ja:
**Quchi (曲池) — Crooked Pond**
Location: Outer elbow crease, at endのfoldるとき腕はbent.
Method: Press firmlyのために2-3 分s各side, twice daily.
Effect: Thekeypointのために清ing 熱から肌. For womenと共に痘痘, rashes, oily 肌,と体 odor, Quchi vents 熱を通じて肌's sur顔. This pointはparticularly effectiveのためにjawlineとcheek 痘痘 that flares前にmenstruation. Press consistentlyのために2 週sにsee 肌 改善ment.

ch4Acupoints.en:
**Sanyinjiao (三阴交) — Three Yin Crossing**
Location: 4 finger-widths above inner ankle bone, on back edge of shinbone.
Method: Gentle circular pressure for 3 minutes each side, morning and evening.
Effect: Strengthens the Spleen (to drain dampness), supports the Liver (to clear heat), and regulates menstruation. For women with heavy periods, PMS acne, and yellowish discharge, this point addresses the women's health dimension of Damp-Heat. Essential daily point.
ch4Acupoints.zh-TW:
**三陰交穴——足太陰脾經、足厥陰肝經、足少陰腎經交會穴**
位置：內踝骨上方四橫指寬處，脛骨後緣。
方法：早晚各以畫圈方式輕柔按壓 3 分鐘，兩側交替。
功效：健脾利濕、養肝清熱、調經止痛。對於經量偏多、經前冒痘、白帶偏黃的女性，此穴針對的是濕熱質中的女性健康層面。這是每日必按的基礎穴位。
ch4Acupoints.ja:
**Sanyinjiao (三阴交) — Three 陰 Crossing**
Location: 4 finger-widths above inner ankle 骨, on 背中 edgeのshin骨.
Method: Gentle circular 圧力のために3 分s各side, 朝と夜.
Effect: Strengthens 脾 (to 利 湿気), サポートs 肝 (to 清 熱),とregulates menstruation. For womenと共にheavy periods, PMS 痘痘,とyellowish おりもの, thispointaddresses women's 健康 dimensionのDamp-H食べる. Essential毎日のpoint.

ch4Acupoints.en:
**Zusanli (足三里) — Leg Three Miles**
Location: 4 finger-widths below kneecap, 1 finger-width outside shinbone.
Method: Press firmly for 3 minutes each leg, morning and evening.
Effect: Strengthens the Spleen — the root cause of dampness accumulation. A strong Spleen prevents dampness from forming in the first place, which means less «fuel» for the heat. For women whose damp-heat worsens after heavy meals or sweets, this point improves digestion and prevents the dampness-heat cycle from restarting.
ch4Acupoints.zh-TW:
**足三里穴——足陽明胃經合穴**
位置：膝蓋骨下方四橫指處，脛骨外側一橫指處。
方法：早晚各按壓 3 分鐘，兩腿交替，力度適中偏重。
功效：健脾和胃——濕氣積聚的根本在於脾虛。脾氣健旺，濕氣便無從生成，熱也就少了「燃料」。對於飽餐或吃甜食後濕熱加重的女性，此穴可改善消化，防止濕熱循環反覆。
ch4Acupoints.ja:
**Zusanli (足三里) — Leg Three Miles**
Location: 4 finger-widths below kneecap, 1 finger-widthoutsideshin骨.
Method: Press firmlyのために3 分s各足, 朝と夜.
Effect: Strengthens 脾 — root causeの湿気 accumulation. A strong 脾 予防s 湿気からformingでfirst place,どれmeans less «fuel»のために熱. For women誰のdamp-熱 worsens後にheavy 食事sかsweets, thispoint改善s digestionと予防s 湿気-熱 cycleから休息arting.

title.en: Mung Bean, Coix Seed & Kelp Heat-Clearing Soup
title.ja: Mung Bean, Coix Seed & Kelp H食べる-Cl耳ing Soup

tcmPrinciple.en: The #1 soup for Damp-Heat women. Mung beans clear heat and resolve toxicity — they're the ultimate cooling food. Coix seeds drain dampness. Kelp resolves phlegm and softens nodules (helpful for cystic acne). This soup directly addresses both sides of the pattern: it cools the heat AND drains the dampness. Drink 3-4 times per week, especially in summer.
tcmPrinciple.zh-TW: 濕熱質女性的首選湯品。綠豆清熱解毒——是終極的清涼食材。薏米利水滲濕。海帶化痰軟堅散結（對囊腫型痘痘有幫助）。這道湯直接針對體質的兩面：既清熱，又利濕。每週飲用 3-4 次，夏季尤為推薦。
tcmPrinciple.ja: The #1 スープのためにDamp-H食べる women. Mung beans 清 熱とresolve toxicity — they're ultimate 冷やすing 食物. Coix seeds 利 湿気. Kelp resolves 痰とsoftens nodules (ヘルプfulのためにcystic 痘痘). This スープ directly addresses両方的sidesのpattern: it 冷やすs 熱 AND 利s 湿気. Drink 3-4倍per 週, especiallyで夏.

steps.en: Soak mung beans for 1 hour. Roast coix seeds for 5 minutes. Soak kelp 15 minutes, cut into strips.
steps.zh-TW: 綠豆浸泡 1 小時。薏米乾炒 5 分鐘。海帶泡發 15 分鐘後切條。
steps.ja: Soak mung beansのために1 時間. Roast coix seedsのために5 分s. Soak kelp 15 分s, cutにstrips.

steps.en: Blanch pork ribs for 2 minutes. Rinse clean.
steps.zh-TW: 豬排骨汆燙 2 分鐘，沖洗乾淨。
steps.ja: Blanch pork ribsのために2 分s. Rinse clean.

steps.en: Place all ingredients in 1.2 liters of water. Bring to boil.
steps.zh-TW: 所有材料放入 1.2 公升水中，大火煮沸。
steps.ja: Placeすべて材料sで1.2 litersの水. Bringにboil.

steps.en: Simmer for 1 hour until mung beans are soft and splitting. Season with salt.
steps.zh-TW: 轉小火煲 1 小時，至綠豆開花軟爛。加鹽調味。
steps.ja: Simmerのために1 時間までmung beansはsoftとsplitting. Seasonと共にsalt.

steps.en: Eat the beans and kelp — they carry the medicine. Drink the broth throughout the day.
steps.zh-TW: 連湯帶料一起食用——豆和海帶承載了養生功效。湯汁可全天分次飲用。
steps.ja: Eat beansとkelp — they carry wellness. Drink broth throughout 日.

tip.en: Your signature soup. Drink 3-4 times per week during active breakouts, 2 times per week for maintenance. Do NOT add sugar — the slight natural sweetness of mung beans is part of the therapeutic effect. You should notice reduced skin oiliness within the first week and calmer digestion within 3 days.
tip.zh-TW: 這是你的招牌湯。痘痘活躍期每週喝 3-4 次，保養期每週 2 次。不要加糖——綠豆淡淡的天然甘味本身就是養生功效的一部分。第一週內你應該會注意到皮膚出油減少，3 天內消化會更順暢。
tip.ja: Your signature スープ. Drink 3-4倍per 週の間にactive breakouts, 2倍per 週のためにmaintenance. Do NOT追加sugar — slight natural sweetnessのmung beansはpartのtherapeutic effect. Youすべきnotice 軽減d 肌 油脂 within最初の週と鎮めるer digestionwithin3 日s.

title.en: Winter Melon, Old Cucumber & Pork Bone Cooling Soup
title.ja: Winter Melon, Old Cucumber & Pork Bone Cooling Soup

tcmPrinciple.en: Winter melon clears heat and promotes urination — it's like a natural internal coolant. Old cucumber (not regular cucumber — specifically the mature, yellow-skinned variety) clears heat and resolves dampness more powerfully than its younger counterpart. Together, they create a deeply cooling soup that vents heat through urination. For women with acne, dark urine, and the feeling of internal «burning,» this soup provides systematic relief.
tcmPrinciple.zh-TW: 冬瓜清熱利尿——就像天然的體內降溫劑。老黃瓜（不是普通小黃瓜——特指成熟後皮色轉黃的品種）清熱化濕的效果比嫩黃瓜更強。兩者搭配煲出的湯清熱效果深層，能透過利尿排出熱邪。對於有痘痘、尿液顏色偏深、以及體內「燒灼感」的女性，這道湯能提供系統性的緩解。
tcmPrinciple.ja: Winter melon 清s 熱とpromotes urination — it'slikea natural 内側の 冷やすant. Old cucumber (not regular cucumber — specifically mature, yellow-肌ned variety) 清s 熱とresolves 湿気 more powerfully than its younger counterpart. Together, they cr食べるe a 深層ly 冷やすing スープ that vents 熱を通じてurination. For womenと共に痘痘, dark 尿,とfeelingの内側の «burning,» this スープ provides systematic relief.

steps.en: Cut winter melon and old cucumber into large chunks (keep skin on both).
steps.zh-TW: 冬瓜和老黃瓜切大塊（兩者皆保留外皮）。
steps.ja: Cut 冬 melonとold cucumberにlarge chunks (keep 肌 on both).

steps.en: Blanch pork bones for 3 minutes. Rinse clean.
steps.zh-TW: 豬骨汆燙 3 分鐘，沖洗乾淨。
steps.ja: Blanch pork 骨sのために3 分s. Rinse clean.

steps.en: Place bones, ginger, and dried scallop in 1.5 liters of water. Simmer 1 hour.
steps.zh-TW: 豬骨、生薑和乾瑤柱放入 1.5 公升水中，煲 1 小時。
steps.ja: Place 骨s, ginger,とdried scallopで1.5 litersの水. Simmer 1 時間.

steps.en: Add winter melon and cucumber. Simmer 30 more minutes. Season lightly with salt.
steps.zh-TW: 加入冬瓜和老黃瓜，再煲 30 分鐘。加少許鹽調味。
steps.ja: Add 冬 melonとcucumber. Simmer 30 more 分s. Season lightlyと共にsalt.

tip.en: A summer essential. Old cucumber is available at Asian markets — it's large, yellow-brown, and has a more concentrated cooling effect than regular cucumber. Drink 2-3 times per week in summer. The broth should be light and slightly sweet. Eat the winter melon — it's the most therapeutic part.
tip.zh-TW: 夏季必備湯品。老黃瓜在傳統市場可以買到——個頭大、呈黃褐色，清熱效果比普通小黃瓜更集中。夏季每週飲用 2-3 次。湯色應清淡微甜。冬瓜要吃掉——那是食療功效最好的部分。
tip.ja: A 夏 essential. Old cucumberはavailable at Asian markets — it's large, yellow-brown,とhas a more concentrated 冷やすing効果than regular cucumber. Drink 2-3倍per 週で夏. The broth shouldであるlightとslightly sweet. Eat 冬 melon — it'smosttherapeutic part.

title.en: Bitter Melon, Pork & Black Bean Soup
title.ja: Bitter Melon, Pork & Black Bean Soup

tcmPrinciple.en: Bitter melon is the most heat-clearing vegetable in the Chinese diet — its bitterness is literally the medicine. It clears heat, resolves toxicity, and improves skin conditions. Black beans tonify Kidney Yin (cooling) and support hormonal balance. Tangerine peel prevents the cold-natured ingredients from damaging the Spleen. This soup is targeted medicine for active breakouts and inflammation.
tcmPrinciple.zh-TW: 苦瓜是中式飲食中最清熱的蔬菜——它的苦味本身就是養生功效。苦瓜清熱解毒、改善皮膚問題。黑豆滋補腎陰（偏涼性）並支持荷爾蒙平衡。陳皮理氣健脾，防止寒涼食材傷脾。這道湯是針對痘痘爆發和發炎症狀的食療良方。
tcmPrinciple.ja: Bitter melonはmost 熱-清ing vegetableでChinese 食事 — its bitternessはliterally 養生素材. It 清s 熱, resolves toxicity,と改善s 肌 状態s. Black beans 補 腎 陰 (冷やすing)とサポート hormonal バランス. T怒りine peel 予防s cold-natured 材料sからdamaging 脾. This スープはtargeted 薬のためにactive breakoutsとinflammation.

steps.en: Soak black beans for 2 hours. Cut bitter melon in half, remove seeds and white pith, cut into chunks.
steps.zh-TW: 黑豆浸泡 2 小時。苦瓜對半切開，去除籽和白瓤，切塊。
steps.ja: Soak black beansのために2 時間s. Cut bitter melonでhalf,削除seedsとwhite pith, cutにchunks.

steps.en: Blanch pork ribs for 2 minutes. Rinse.
steps.zh-TW: 豬排骨汆燙 2 分鐘，沖洗乾淨。
steps.ja: Blanch pork ribsのために2 分s. Rinse.

steps.en: Place ribs, black beans, ginger, and tangerine peel in 1.2 liters of water. Simmer 1 hour.
steps.zh-TW: 排骨、黑豆、生薑和陳皮放入 1.2 公升水中，煲 1 小時。
steps.ja: Place ribs, black beans, ginger,とt怒りine peelで1.2 litersの水. Simmer 1 時間.

steps.en: Add bitter melon. Simmer 15 minutes more. Season with salt.
steps.zh-TW: 加入苦瓜，再煲 15 分鐘。加鹽調味。
steps.ja: Add bitter melon. Simmer 15 分s more. Seasonと共にsalt.

tip.en: The bitterness is the medicine — don't try to mask it. If you're new to bitter melon, remove ALL the white pith inside (it's the most bitter part). Drink 2-3 times per week during acne flares. The effect on skin oiliness is often noticeable within 3-5 days. Not recommended during menstruation (too cooling).
tip.zh-TW: 苦味就是養生功效——不要試圖掩蓋它。如果你剛開始吃苦瓜，把內部的白瓤全部去除（那是最苦的部分）。痘痘爆發期間每週飲用 2-3 次。對皮膚出油的改善通常在 3-5 天內就能感受到。經期不建議飲用（性質偏涼）。
tip.ja: The bitterness is wellness — don't tryにmask it. If you're newにbitter melon,削除ALL white pithinside(it'smostbitter part). Drink 2-3倍per 週の間に痘痘 flares. The効果on 肌 油脂はoften noticeablewithin3-5 日s. Not recommendedの間にmenstruation (too 冷やすing).

title.en: Lotus Root, Pork & Red Date Nourishing Soup
title.ja: Lotus Root, Pork & Red Date Nourishing Soup

tcmPrinciple.en: Lotus root clears heat while also nourishing blood — a rare combination. It doesn't just cool; it rebuilds. For women whose Damp-Heat has damaged their blood (shown as heavy periods, dry skin despite oiliness, or dull complexion), lotus root repairs while cooling. Red dates and goji berries support blood and Yin, preventing the cooling herbs from being too harsh on menstruation.
tcmPrinciple.zh-TW: 蓮藕既能清熱又能養血——這是很少見的組合。它不僅降溫，還能修復。對於濕熱已損傷陰血的女性（表現為經量偏多、皮膚雖油卻又乾燥、面色暗沉），蓮藕在清熱的同時進行修復。紅棗和枸杞補血養陰，防止清熱食材對月經造成過度影響。
tcmPrinciple.ja: Lotus root 清s 熱の間にalso 滋養ing 血 — a rare combination. It doesn'tただ冷やす; it rebuilds. For women誰のDamp-H食べる持っているdamaged their 血 (shown as heavy periods,乾燥した肌 despite 油脂,かdull complexion), lotus root repairsの間に冷やすing. Red datesとgoji berries サポート 血と陰, preventing cooling herbsからbeingもharsh on menstruation.

steps.en: Peel and slice lotus root into thick rounds. Blanch pork ribs for 2 minutes.
steps.zh-TW: 蓮藕去皮切厚片。豬排骨汆燙 2 分鐘。
steps.ja: Peelとslice lotus rootにthick rounds. Blanch pork ribsのために2 分s.

steps.en: Place ribs, lotus root, red dates, and ginger in 1.5 liters of water. Simmer 1 hour.
steps.zh-TW: 排骨、蓮藕、紅棗和生薑放入 1.5 公升水中，煲 1 小時。
steps.ja: Place ribs, lotus root, red dates,とgingerで1.5 litersの水. Simmer 1 時間.

steps.en: Add goji berries in the last 10 minutes. Season with salt.
steps.zh-TW: 最後 10 分鐘加入枸杞。加鹽調味。
steps.ja: Add goji berriesでlast 10 分s. Seasonと共にsalt.

tip.en: A balanced daily soup — cooling but not harsh. Safe for menstruation (unlike bitter melon soup). The lotus root should be tender but not mushy. Drink 2-3 times per week. Excellent for women with Damp-Heat who also have blood deficiency (heavy periods, pale nails, dizziness on standing).
tip.zh-TW: 這是一道均衡的日常湯品——清熱而不傷正。經期也可安心飲用（不像苦瓜湯）。蓮藕應軟糯但不爛。每週飲用 2-3 次。非常適合濕熱兼有血虛的女性（經量偏多、指甲偏白、站立時頭暈）。
tip.ja: A バランスd毎日のスープ — 冷やすing butないharsh. Safeのためにmenstruation (unlike bitter melon スープ). The lotus root shouldであるtender butないmushy. Drink 2-3倍per 週. Excellentのためにwomenと共にDamp-H食べる誰also持っている血 deficiency (heavy periods, pale nails, めまい on standing).

tcmPrinciple.en: Watercress clears heat, resolves toxicity, and benefits the lungs and skin. Dried figs moisten and provide gentle sweetness that doesn't create dampness. Sweet apricot kernels moisten the lungs and support skin health. This is a "beauty from within" soup — it clears the heat that causes acne while nourishing the skin that's been damaged by inflammation.
tcmPrinciple.zh-TW: 西洋菜清熱解毒、潤肺美膚。無花果潤燥生津，提供不生濕的溫和甜味。南杏潤肺養膚。這是一道「從內而外養顏」的湯品——它清除導致痘痘的熱，同時滋養因發炎受損的肌膚。
tcmPrinciple.ja: Watercress 清s 熱, resolves toxicity,とbenefits lungsと肌. Dried figs 潤すとprovide gentle sweetness that doesn't cr食べるe 湿気. Sweet apricot kernels 潤す lungsとサポート 肌 健康. Thisはa "beautyからwithin" スープ — it 清s 熱 that causes 痘痘の間に滋養ing 肌 that'sあったdamagedによるinflammation.

steps.en: Wash watercress thoroughly. Blanch pork bones for 3 minutes. Rinse.
steps.zh-TW: 西洋菜仔細洗淨。豬骨汆燙 3 分鐘，沖洗乾淨。
steps.ja: Wash 水cress thoroughly. Blanch pork 骨sのために3 分s. Rinse.

steps.en: Place bones, figs, apricot kernels, and ginger in 1.5 liters of water. Simmer 1 hour.
steps.zh-TW: 豬骨、無花果、南杏和生薑放入 1.5 公升水中，煲 1 小時。
steps.ja: Place 骨s, figs, apricot kernels,とgingerで1.5 litersの水. Simmer 1 時間.

steps.en: Add watercress, simmer 15 minutes. Season with salt.
steps.zh-TW: 加入西洋菜，再煲 15 分鐘。加鹽調味。
steps.ja: Add 水cress,煮る15 分s. Seasonと共にsalt.

tip.en: A classic Cantonese soup specifically designed for Damp-Heat skin conditions. Watercress is available at most supermarkets. The soup should be light green and slightly sweet from the figs. Drink 2-3 times per week. Particularly effective for women with both acne and dry/dull skin — the combination of clearing and nourishing is unique to this recipe.
tip.zh-TW: 這是一道專為濕熱肌膚問題設計的經典廣東湯。西洋菜在大部分超市都能買到。湯色應呈淡綠色，帶有無花果的微微甜味。每週飲用 2-3 次。特別適合同時有痘痘和肌膚乾燥暗沉的女性——清熱與滋養並行的組合是這道湯的獨到之處。
tip.ja: A classic Cantonese スープ specifically designedのためにDamp-H食べる 肌 状態s. Watercressはavailable atmostsupermarkets. The スープ shouldであるlight greenとslightly sweetからfigs. Drink 2-3倍per 週. Particularly effectiveのためにwomenと共にboth 痘痘とdry/dull 肌 — combinationの清ingと滋養ingはuniqueにthis レシピ.

title.en: Coix Seed, Chinese Yam & Spleen Support Congee
title.ja: Coix Seed, Chinese Yam & 脾 Support Congee

tcmPrinciple.en: This congee targets the ROOT — a weak Spleen that can't drain dampness. Coix seed drains dampness, Chinese yam strengthens the Spleen, rice and millet provide easy-to-digest nourishment. For Damp-Heat women whose digestive system is easily upset, this congee is the gentlest way to strengthen the Spleen without generating more heat. Eat as breakfast 3-4 times per week.
tcmPrinciple.zh-TW: 這道粥針對的是根本——無力運化水濕的脾虛。薏米利水滲濕，山藥健脾益氣，大米和小米提供易消化的營養。對於腸胃容易不適的濕熱質女性，這道粥是最溫和的健脾方式，不會額外生熱。每週作為早餐食用 3-4 次。
tcmPrinciple.ja: This congee targets ROOT — a weak 脾 that can't 利 湿気. Coix seed 利s 湿気, Chinese yam 強化s 脾, riceとmillet provide easy-to-digest 滋養ment. For Damp-H食べる women誰の消化器系はeasily upset, this congeeはgentlest wayに強化 脾 없이generating more 熱. Eat as 朝食 3-4倍per 週.

steps.en: Roast coix seeds for 5 minutes. Peel and dice Chinese yam (wear gloves).
steps.zh-TW: 薏米乾炒 5 分鐘。山藥去皮切丁（建議戴手套）。
steps.ja: Roast coix seedsのために5 分s. Peelとdice Chinese yam (w耳 gloves).

steps.en: Wash rice and millet. Place all ingredients in 1 liter of water.
steps.zh-TW: 大米和小米淘洗乾淨。所有材料放入 1 公升水中。
steps.ja: Wash riceとmillet. Placeすべて材料sで1 literの水.

steps.en: Bring to boil, then simmer 40 minutes until thick and porridge-like. Stir occasionally.
steps.zh-TW: 大火煮沸後轉小火熬 40 分鐘，至濃稠粥狀。不時攪拌。
steps.ja: Bringにboil,その後simmer 40 分sまでthickとporridge-like. Stir occasionally.

tip.en: A gentle daily breakfast that rebuilds your Spleen over time. The yam should be soft and almost dissolve into the porridge. This is NOT a quick-fix soup — it's a long-term Spleen-rebuilding strategy that prevents dampness from forming in the first place. Eat 3-4 mornings per week for best results.
tip.zh-TW: 這是一道溫和的日常早餐，長期食用可重建脾的功能。山藥應煮至軟爛，幾乎融化在粥中。這不是速效湯——而是長期健脾策略，從源頭防止濕氣的產生。每週早餐食用 3-4 次效果最佳。
tip.ja: A gentle毎日の朝食 that rebuilds your 脾上にtime. The yam shouldであるsoftとalmost dissolveにporridge. ThisはNOT a quick-fix スープ — it's a long-term 脾-rebuildingstrategythat 予防s 湿気からformingでfirst place. Eat 3-4 朝s per 週のためにbest results.

title.en: Hawthorn, Tangerine Peel & Cassia Detox Tea-Soup
title.zh-TW: 山楂陳皮決明子排毒湯
title.ja: Hawthorn, T怒りine Peel & Cassia Detox Tea-Soup

ch6Recipes.titleZh: 山楂陈皮决明子排毒汤

tcmPrinciple.en: Hawthorn digests fats and resolves stagnation. Cassia seed clears Liver heat and promotes bowel movements. Chrysanthemum clears heat and calms the Liver. Tangerine peel moves Qi. Licorice harmonizes the formula and protects the stomach. This tea-soup addresses the «aftermath» of Damp-Heat — the stagnation, the toxin accumulation, and the liver overload — making it ideal for post-indulgence recovery.
tcmPrinciple.zh-TW: 山楂消食化積、化解油脂。決明子清肝熱、潤腸通便。菊花清熱平肝。陳皮理氣。甘草調和諸味、保護脾胃。這道茶湯針對的是濕熱的「後遺」——積滯、毒素累積和肝臟負擔過重——非常適合在大餐後作為恢復飲品。
tcmPrinciple.ja: Hawthorn digests 脂肪sとresolves stagnation. Cassia seed 清s 肝 熱とpromotes bowel movements. Chrysanthemum 清s 熱と鎮めるs 肝. T怒りine peel moves 気. Licorice h腕onizes formulaと保護s stomach. This お茶-スープ addresses «aftermath»のDamp-H食べる — stagnation, toxin accumulation,とliver overload — making it idealのためにpost-indulgence recovery.

steps.en: Toast cassia seeds lightly for 2 minutes until fragrant.
steps.zh-TW: 決明子小火乾炒 2 分鐘至飄出香氣。
steps.ja: Toast cassia seeds lightlyのために2 分sまでfragrant.

steps.en: Place all ingredients in 1 liter of water. Bring to boil.
steps.zh-TW: 所有材料放入 1 公升水中，大火煮沸。
steps.ja: Placeすべて材料sで1 literの水. Bringにboil.

steps.en: Simmer 15 minutes. Strain. Drink warm between meals.
steps.zh-TW: 轉小火煮 15 分鐘。濾渣。飯間溫飲。
steps.ja: Simmer 15 分s. Strain. Drink 温めるの間に食事s.

tip.en: More of a therapeutic tea than a meal. Drink 1-2 cups daily, especially after heavier meals or during acne flares. The slight sourness is the hawthorn working — don't add sugar. Take a 1-week break after 3 weeks of continuous use. Particularly helpful for women with constipation + acne + irritability.
tip.zh-TW: 這更像是一道食療茶飲而非正餐湯品。每日飲用 1-2 杯，特別是在大餐之後或痘痘爆發期間。微酸的口感是山楂在發揮作用——不要加糖。連續飲用 3 週後休息 1 週。特別適合有便秘＋痘痘＋煩躁症狀的女性。
tip.ja: Moreのa therapeutic お茶 than a 食事. Drink 1-2 cups daily, especially後にheavier 食事sかduring 痘痘 flares. The slight sournessはhawthorn 仕事ing — don't追加sugar. Take a 1-週 break後に3 週sのcontinuous use. Particularly ヘルプfulのためにwomenと共に便秘 + 痘痘 + 短気.

tcmPrinciple.en: Tofu clears heat and is light on the Spleen. Shiitake supports the immune system and resolves phlegm. Watercress clears heat and benefits skin. This is a quick, light, cooling soup perfect as a dinner replacement when your skin is flaring up or you've eaten too heavily at lunch. It provides nutrition without adding fuel to the fire.
tcmPrinciple.zh-TW: 豆腐清熱且不增加脾胃負擔。香菇扶正祛邪、化痰理氣。西洋菜清熱利膚。這是一道快手清湯，非常適合在皮膚爆痘或午餐吃得太豐盛時代替晚餐。它提供營養，卻不會火上澆油。
tcmPrinciple.ja: Tofu 清s 熱とis light on 脾. Shiitake サポートs 免疫系とresolves 痰. Watercress 清s 熱とbenefits 肌. Thisはa quick, light, 冷やすing スープ perfect as a 夕食 replacementるときyour 肌はflaring upかyou've 食べるenもheavily at 昼食. It provides 栄養 없이adding fuelにfire.

steps.en: Slice tofu into cubes. Slice shiitake mushrooms. Wash watercress.
steps.zh-TW: 豆腐切小塊。香菇切片。西洋菜洗淨。
steps.ja: Slice tofuにcubes. Slice shiitake mushrooms. Wash 水cress.

steps.en: Bring 800ml water to boil with ginger. Add mushrooms, simmer 5 minutes.
steps.zh-TW: 800 毫升水加生薑煮沸，放入香菇，煮 5 分鐘。
steps.ja: Bring 800ml 水にboilと共にginger. Add mushrooms,煮る5 分s.

steps.en: Add tofu and watercress. Simmer 3 minutes. Season with salt and white pepper.
steps.zh-TW: 加入豆腐和西洋菜，煮 3 分鐘。加鹽和白胡椒調味。
steps.ja: Add tofuと水cress. Simmer 3 分s. Seasonと共にsaltとwhite pepper.

tip.en: A 15-minute quick soup — perfect for busy evenings. The silken tofu is more cooling than firm tofu. White pepper (not black) specifically supports the Spleen. This is your «I don't have time but my skin needs help» soup. Safe for daily consumption.
tip.zh-TW: 15 分鐘快手湯——忙碌的晚上最適合。嫩豆腐比老豆腐更清涼。白胡椒（非黑胡椒）特別能溫健脾胃。這是你的「沒時間但皮膚需要幫助」專用湯。可每日飲用。
tip.ja: A 15-分 quick スープ — perfectのためにbusy 夜s. The silken tofuはmore 冷やすing than firm tofu. White pepper (not black) specifically サポートs 脾. Thisはyour «I don't持っているtime but my 肌 needs ヘルプ» スープ. Safeのためにdaily consumption.

footer.en: Cooling breakfasts, no spicy/fried/alcohol, daily sweating through exercise. Your body clears heat through sweat and urination — support both. Note acne flares, irritability, and bowel movements in Body Notes. Skin improvement by Day 5-7, mood stabilization by Day 10-14.
footer.zh-TW: 清涼早餐，忌辛辣油炸及酒精，每日透過運動出汗排毒。身體透過汗液和尿液排出熱邪——兩方面都要支持。在身體筆記中記錄痘痘爆發、煩躁情緒和排便情況。皮膚改善約在第 5-7 天出現，情緒穩定約在第 10-14 天。
footer.ja: Cooling 朝食s,ないspicy/fried/alcohol,毎日のsw食べるingを通じて運動. Your 体 清s 熱を通じてsw食べるとurination — サポート both. Note 痘痘 flares, 短気,とbowel movementsでBody Notes. Skin 改善mentによるDay 5-7,気分stabilizationによるDay 10-14.

footer.en: Rate energy and sleep 1-5. Track acne, skin oiliness, tongue coating, and irritability in Body Notes. Weigh weekly (Sunday morning). Note period days and PMS severity. Skin changes visible by Day 5-7. Mood stabilization by Day 10-14.
footer.zh-TW: 精力與睡眠評分 1-5 分。在身體筆記中記錄痘痘、皮膚出油狀況、舌苔和煩躁程度。每週日早晨量體重。記錄經期天數和經前症候群的嚴重程度。皮膚變化約在第 5-7 天可見。情緒穩定約在第 10-14 天。
footer.ja: Rate 精力と睡眠 1-5. Track 痘痘, 肌 油脂, 舌 coating,と短気でBody Notes. Weigh 週ly (Sun日 朝). Note period 日sとPMS severity. Skin changes visibleによるDay 5-7. Mood stabilizationによるDay 10-14.
